raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A white bowl sits on a metallic surface, containing several yellow bananas. The bananas are clustered together. STRATEGY - First, reach into the bowl to grasp a banana. Since bananas are clustered, the gripper must be positioned to pick one without disturbing others. Grasp the banana by its body, then transport it to a destination (e.g., a plate or counter). Failure modes include missing the banana or picking multiple. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach into the bowl to locate a banana. Step 2: Grasp the banana by its body for secure hold. Step 3: Transport the banana to a destination. Step 4: Place the banana on the destination surface.**
Goal: any_in(banana, bowl); stable(banana)
Scene: white_bowl, banana, metallic_surface
Step 1: reach(bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the white bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, bowl, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, bowl) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(banana)
  affordance_region: the body of a yellow banana inside the bowl
  contact: holding(banana) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(banana)
Step 3: transport(banana -> metallic_surface)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the metallic surface
  spatial: above(banana, metallic_surface, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(banana)
  done_when: above(banana, metallic_surface, 0.05)
Step 4: place(banana -> metallic_surface)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the metallic surface
  contact: surface_contact(banana, metallic_surface) [completion]; released(banana) [completion]
  pose: stable(banana) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(banana, metallic_surface) AND released(banana)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the rim of the white bowl
the body of a yellow banana inside the bowl
an empty area on the metallic surface
an empty area on the metallic surface
